title: besleria membranacea
intro: Besleria membranacea, also known as the membranous besleria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat various respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Besleria membranacea include its antispasmodic and expectorant properties, which help to relieve coughs and ease congestion. Besleria membranacea can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions or decoctions, allowing for the extraction of its medicinal compounds.
